memoryArtifacts.headline: Ruggles Family History from History of Milford, 1882
memoryArtifacts.description:
Ruggles genealogy from History of the towns of New Milford and Bridgewater, Connecticut, 1703-1882
by Orcutt, Samuel, 1824-1893
Publication date 1882
https://archive.org/details/ldpd_11727486_000

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mercy Woodbridge於1672年9月27日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦吉林沃斯時，她的父親Reverend John Woodbridge28歲，母親Abigail Leete24歲。她於1696年11月19日與Benjamin Ruggles在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德素費爾德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1707年6月28日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德素費爾德享年34歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德素費爾德笛卡爾 特 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mercy Woodbridge于1672年9月27日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦吉林沃斯时，她的父亲Reverend John Woodbridge28岁，母亲Abigail Leete24岁。她于1696年11月19日与Benjamin Ruggles在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德素費爾德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1707年6月28日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德素費爾德享年34岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德素費爾德笛卡爾 特 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Woodbridge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Woodbridge in Suffolk or Dorset, both named from Old English wudu ‘wood’ + brycg ‘bridge’ (i.e. a bridge made of timber or one near a wood), or a topographic name denoting a person who lived by a wooden bridge or a bridge in or near a wood, from Middle English wode ‘wood’ + brigge ‘bridge’ (Old English wudu + brycg).
History: John Woodbridge (1613–95), emigrated in 1634 from Stanton in Wiltshire, England, to Newbury, MA, where he was pastor and magistrate.

nameMeanings.name: Mercy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the quality of magnanimity, and in particular God's forgiveness of sinners, a quality much prized in Christian tradition. The word is derived from Latin merces, which originally meant ‘wage’ or ‘reward’ ( see Mercedes ). The name was in regular use from the mid 15th century onwards and was favoured by the Puritans; Mercy is the companion of Christiana in the second part of John Bunyan's Pilgrim's Progress ( 1684 ). Subsequently, it fell out of use as a given name. In modern use, this is often an Anglicized form of Mercedes.

en.lifeSummary: When Mercy Woodbridge was born on 27 September 1672, in Killingworth, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Reverend John Woodbridge, was 28 and her mother, Abigail Leete, was 24. She married Benjamin Ruggles on 19 November 1696, in Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 28 June 1707, in Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 34, and was buried in Old Center Cemetery, Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mercy Woodbridge est née le 27 septembre 1672, à Killingworth, New London, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Reverend John Woodbridge, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Abigail Leete, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Benjamin Ruggles le 19 novembre 1696, à Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 juin 1707, à Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterrée à Old Center Cemetery, Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mercy Woodbridge am 27. September 1672 in Killingworth, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Reverend John Woodbridge 28 und ihre Mutter Abigail Leete 24. Sie hat am 19. November 1696 in Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Benjamin Ruggles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. Juni 1707 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Old Center Cemetery, Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mercy Woodbridge è nata il il 27 settembre 1672 nel Killingworth, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Reverend John Woodbridge, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Abigail Leete, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Benjamin Ruggles il 19 novembre 1696, nel Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 28 giugno 1707, nel Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolta a Old Center Cemetery, Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Mercy Woodbridgeが1672年9月27日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンキリングウオルスで生まれた時，父Reverend John Woodbridgeは28歳，母Abigail Leeteは24歳であった。1696年11月19日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードスフィールドでBenjamin Rugglesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1707年6月28日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードスフィールドで34歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードスフィールドオルド センター セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 수필드

ko.Killingworth, New London, Connecticut, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 킬링워스
ko.lifeSummary: Mercy Woodbridge(이)가 1672년 9월 27일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 킬링워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Reverend John Woodbridge(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Abigail Leete(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1696년 11월 19일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 수필드에서 Benjamin Ruggles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1707년 6월 28일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 수필드에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 수필드 드 세터 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mercy Woodbridge nasceu em 27 de setembro de 1672, em Killingworth, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, Reverend John Woodbridge, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Abigail Leete, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Benjamin Ruggles em 19 de novembro de 1696, em Suffield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 28 de junho de 1707, em Suffield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 34 anos, e foi sepultada em Old Center Cemetery, Suffield, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mercy Woodbridge родилась 27 сентября 1672 г. в местности киллингворт, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Reverend John Woodbridge было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Abigail Leete, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Benjamin Ruggles 19 ноября 1696 г. в местности суффиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 28 июня 1707 г. в местности суффиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 34 лет и была похоронена в местности олд кентир кеметири, суффиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mercy Woodbridge nació el 27 de septiembre de 1672, en Killingworth, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Reverend John Woodbridge, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Abigail Leete, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Benjamin Ruggles el 19 de noviembre de 1696, en Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 28 de junio de 1707, en Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultada en Old Center Cemetery, Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
